title: New Generation IX Pokémon added
description: All 103 new Pokémon from the Paldea region are now available via the API.

title: Fixed species evolution chain links
description: Evolution chain URLs were returning 404 for certain Generation VIII Pokémon. This has been resolved.

title: Added move damage class data
description: Move responses now include damage class (physical/special/status) information.

title: Removed deprecated `/api/v1` endpoints
description: The legacy v1 API has been removed. All clients must migrate to v2. The v2 API has been stable since 2016.

title: Fixed pagination offset calculation
description: Large offset values were causing incorrect results. The bug has been fixed and pagination is now consistent.

title: Location area encounter data
description: New endpoints added for location area encounters, including Pokémon encounter rates per game version.
